title: Injection device for delivering a defined number of equal doses of a fluid substance
abstract: Injection device for delivering a defined number (n) of equal doses of a fluid substance contained in a reservoir (P), the device having a housing (1) within which an arming mechanism and a dose delivery mechanism are arranged along the longitudinal axis of the housing, the housing (1) being coupled to an enclosure (3) adapted for receiving the reservoir (P) with the fluid substance, the arming mechanism comprising a setting sleeve (5) which is axially non-displaceable and rotatable around the axis of the housing in two opposite directions by a defined setting angle (a), the setting sleeve (5) being coupled with a spring (10) which is strained by the rotation of the setting sleeve (5) during arming of the device; the dose delivery mechanism comprising a screw ring (6) and a piston rod (4) which is non-rotatable and axially displaceable within the setting sleeve (5), the piston rod (4) cooperating with the screw ring (6) so that during arming of the device the screw ring (6) and the piston rod (4) are immobilized, and during delivery of each dose the piston rod (4) is displaced along the housing (1) by a defined distance due to unwinding of the spring (10) and rotation of the screw ring (6), the displacement of the piston rod (4) causing the fluid substance to be discharged from the reservoir (P). The injection device according to the invention is provided with blocking means preventing arming of the device for delivery of a subsequent dose after said defined number (n) of doses of a fluid substance have been delivered, the blocking means comprising at least one longitudinal protrusion (5.1) located near the distal end of the setting sleeve (5) on its inside surface, and at least one longitudinal arm (4.2) located at the proximal end of the piston rod (4), the at least one longitudinal protrusion (5.1) and the at least one longitudinal arm (4.2) mutually blocking each other after said defined number (n) of doses of a fluid substance have been delivered which prevents rotation of the setting sleeve (5) by the entire setting angle (Î±) in the arming direction.
claims:
Claims Patent claims 1. Injection device for delivering a defined number (n) of equal doses of a fluid substance contained in a reservoir (P), the device having a housing (1) within which an arming mechanism and a dose delivery mechanism are arranged along the longitudinal axis of the housing, the housing (1) being coupled to an enclosure (3) adapted for receiving the reservoir (P) with the fluid substance, the arming mechanism comprising a setting sleeve (5) which is axially non-displaceable and rotatable around said axis of the housing in two opposite directions by a defined setting angle (a), the setting sleeve (5) being coupled with a spring (10) which is strained by the rotation of the setting sleeve (5) during arming of the device; the dose delivery mechanism comprising a screw ring (6) and a piston rod (4) which is non-rotatable and axially displaceable within the setting sleeve (5), the piston rod (4) cooperating with the screw ring (6) so that during arming of the device the screw ring (6) and the piston rod (4) are immobilized, and during delivery of each dose the piston rod (4) is displaced along the housing (1) by a defined distance due to unwinding of the spring (10) and rotation of the screw ring (6), the displacement of the piston rod (4) causing the fluid substance to be discharged from the reservoir (P), characterized in that the device is provided with blocking means preventing arming of the device for delivery of a subsequent dose after said defined number (n) of doses of a fluid substance have been delivered, the blocking means comprising at least one longitudinal protrusion (5.1) located near the distal end of the setting sleeve (5) on its inside surface, and at least one longitudinal arm (4.2) located at the proximal end of the piston rod (4), the at least one longitudinal protrusion (5.1) and the at least one longitudinal arm (4.2) mutually blocking each other after said defined number (n) of doses of a fluid substance have been delivered which prevents rotation of the setting sleeve (5) by the entire setting angle (a) in the arming direction. 2. Injection device according to claim 1, characterized in that the screw ring (6) has an internal thread (6.1) and the piston rod (4) has an external thread (4.0), said threads cooperating during the rotation of the screw ring (6). 3. Injection device according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that the spring (10) is mounted on the setting sleeve (5) and the arming mechanism further comprises a scale (9) having a form of a sleeve surrounding the setting sleeve (5) and the spring (10), the distal ends of the spring (10) and of the scale (9) being coupled in rotation with the setting sleeve (5), the proximal end of the spring (10) being secured to the housing (1). 4. Injection device according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that the external surface of the piston rod (4) comprises at least one longitudinal groove (4.1) and the dose delivery mechanism further 

 comprises a blocking sleeve (7) having at least one blocking projection (7.1) and preventing the rotation of the piston rod (4) by means of engagement of the at least one blocking projection (7.1) with said at least one groove (4.1). 5. Injection device according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that the screw ring (6) is selectively engaged in rotation with the setting sleeve (5) by means of projections (6.3) arranged on the internal surface of the screw ring (6) in equal distances defined by the setting angle (a) and of an elastic arm (5.4) located on the distal end of the setting sleeve (5), the elastic arm (5.4) engaging one of said projections (6.3) after each rotation by the setting angle (a), the elasticity of the arm (5.4) enabling further rotation of the setting sleeve (5) by a next setting angle (a). 6. Injection device according to claim 1 or 2, characterized in that the screw ring (6) and the piston rod (4) are immobilized during arming of the device by means of a trigger mechanism (12, 13) located on the housing (1). 7. Injection device according to claim 6, characterized in that the trigger mechanism (12, 13) comprises a trigger (13) engaged with the housing (1), the trigger being moveable between a first position in which it blocks the rotation of the screw ring (6) and a second position in which the screw ring (6) is free to rotate; the trigger mechanism (12, 13) further comprising a trigger slide (12) which is displaceable along the housing (1) and coupled with the trigger (13). 8. Injection device according to claim 7, characterized in that the trigger (13) comprises an elastic element (13.1) enabling an automatic return of the trigger (13) and the trigger slide (12) to the first position in which the screw ring (6) is blocked. 9. Injection device according to claim 7 or 8, characterized in that the trigger (13) comprises a projection (13.3) which in the first position of the trigger (13), with the screw ring (6) blocked, is engaged with a corresponding recess (6.2) of the screw ring (6). 10. Injection device according to claim 9, characterized in that the projection (13.3) engages the recess (6.2) with a play (L).
